response.overview: Kael, a young painter on the brink of graduation, embarks on a journey with his best friend Azul, to complete a bucket-list after a devastating loss.  As they turn penned dreams into lingering memories with grief quietly shadowing each step, unraveling of unspoken emotions and hidden truths twist the lines of their bond.  Through it all, one question comes to take shape: how far can time carry a secret before it breaks the ones who hold it?
response.tagline: How far can time carry a secret before it breaks the ones who hold it?
response.title: Anggid
